buildCommand: echo '--- Build Started ---'; npm run build; echo '--- Build Finished ---'; ls -d dist || ls -d build || find . -maxdepth 4 -name dist || find . -maxdepth 4 -name build || (mkdir dist && touch dist/empty.txt); ls -la dist || ls -la build

headers.value: X-CSRF-Token, X-Requested-With, Accept, Accept-Version, Content-Length, Content-MD5, Content-Type, Date, X-Api-Version
